steps.cauldron_grind: Grind the contents of the boiler

effect.henrys: You lose 60% less Health when struck for 15 minutes. If you're Bleeding, the effect is slowed by 60%.
Increases Stamina by 60% and improves Stamina regeneration by 30% for 1 hour.
Increases your Horsemanship and Houndmaster skills by 7 for 1 full day. Dogs won't notice Henry at all, while other animals will take measurably longer to react to him.
Your Speech goes up by 7, you can complete skill books much faster, and you get a 50% boost to earned experience for 2 days.
Cures all poisons and increases Vitality by 3 for 20 minutes, but decreases Nourishment by 20.
Current Energy +30. Your Energy drains 50% slower for 24 hours.
For 48 hours, sleep restores lost health at 500% efficiency and regenerates energy 300% faster.
Sobers you up, cures your hangover, and temporarily removes the effects of alcoholism.
Increases Charisma by 10 for 3 minutes. If used at the same time as another perfume, lowers your Charisma by 7.
Increases your Charisma by 5 for 40 minutes, but lowers it by 5 if used in conjunction with another perfume.
Heals 60 health over the course of 1 minute. Instantly cures hangovers.
Adds 6 to Agility and lowers the Stamina cost of sprinting by 30% for 10 minutes.
Strong homemade alcohol, causes drunkenness and improves mood
Your maximum Stamina decreases 75% less than your health for 25 minutes. Injuries do not impede Henry's actions for the potion's duration.
You gain enhanced night vision for 25 minutes. While the potion lasts, your Energy does not deplete at all.
Victims cannot run, all their weapon skills are reduced by 5, and they gradually suffer 50 damage.

18 Scatter Shot (200 impact damage)
Reduces Energy to 0 and lowers perception. Victims suffer 50% lower Stamina and Stamina regeneration for 24 hours.
Poisoned characters cannot run and lose 110 Health in 15 seconds.
Increases Marksmanship by 8 for 15 minutes. While the potion lasts, aiming does not cost Stamina at all.
Increases Strength by 6 for 15 minutes. In addition, attack and defence cost 35% less Stamina.
Saves your game, restores 30 health, and boosts your Strength, Vitality, and Agility by 3 for 3 minutes.
11 Soap, cleans clothes at a washing place
Increases Craftsmanship and Thievery by 8 for 60 minutes.
Potion that resets all specialisation points and allows them to be redistributed
Silences frightening thoughts and malicious voices. Heals 75 health over 8 hours, +3 vitality and unblocked hits deal 10% less damage.
Fever and related complications can often end in death. This tonic reduces fever if given in time.
